scope: Compact agent-facing index of observed LibMoonCat and local parser helper surfaces in registered upstream reference snapshots.

taskGroups.purpose: Convert or normalize MoonCat identifier forms using observed LibMoonCat limited-bundle helpers.

helpers.name: parseCatId
acceptedIdentifierForms: MoonCat catId input accepted by the helper; exact accepted variants are not fully documented here
outputForms: null when parsing does not produce a string
helpers.notes: Observed wrapper returns a string or null. Use data/identifier-conventions.json before relying on normalization behavior.

helpers.name: getCatId
helpers.notes: Observed as an identifier lookup helper. Behavior is indexed/array-backed in related KB notes, not a closed-form conversion proof.

helpers.name: getMoonCatIdByRescueIndex
outputForms: null for values outside the observed 0-25439 guard
helpers.notes: The local bundle also registers libmooncat.jslib.getMoonCatIdByRescueOrder before exporting the helper under getMoonCatIdByRescueIndex.

helpers.name: getRescueOrder
helpers.notes: Treat as an array-backed reverse lookup helper. Do not infer a closed-form bytes5-to-index formula.

helpers.name: generateMoonCatId
helpers.notes: Observed helper name and export only. This index does not document generation semantics.

helpers.name: randomMoonCatId
helpers.notes: Observed helper name and export only. Random generation behavior is not documented here.

limitations: This group records observed helper names and conservative input/output forms only.
Identifier conversion boundaries remain governed by data/identifier-conventions.json.

taskGroups.purpose: Parse a bytes5-style MoonCat catId into local color-grid data using the standalone parser snapshot.

helpers.name: mooncatparser
helpers.notes: The observed parser strips a leading 0x before parsing. This index does not import design arrays or prove rendering correctness.

helpers.name: hexToBytes
helpers.notes: Local helper name observed in parser snapshot; not exported as a public API surface.

limitations: Parser internals, design tables, palettes, and output examples are not imported.
The parser snapshot is a reference input, not curated KB behavior proof.

taskGroups.purpose: Access trait helper surfaces exposed by the LibMoonCat limited bundle.

helpers.name: getTraits
acceptedIdentifierForms: result type plus MoonCat catId input accepted by parseCatId
outputForms: error-like map for unrecognized result type
helpers.notes: Observed result type branches include basic, extended, erc721, and ERC721. This file does not define the returned fields; use data/trait-index.json for snapshot field metadata.

helpers.name: filterRescueOrders
helpers.notes: Observed helper name/export only. Filter semantics are not documented here.

limitations: No per-cat trait rows or full trait mappings are imported.
No claim is made that LibMoonCat output fields exactly match current API or on-chain trait surfaces.

taskGroups.purpose: Locate image/rendering helper categories exposed in the LibMoonCat limited bundle and parser snapshot.

helpers.name: generateImage
helpers.notes: Observed arities allow one to three arguments. Exact output format is not documented in this surface index.

helpers.name: generateImageWithDimensions
helpers.notes: Observed arities allow one to three arguments. Exact output shape is not imported.

helpers.name: fullPalette
helpers.notes: Observed default call uses a catId literal inside the bundle, but this index does not promote that value as a canonical sample.

helpers.name: RGBToHSL
helpers.notes: Local parser helper, not an exported parser API.

helpers.name: HSLToRGB
helpers.notes: Local parser helper, not an exported parser API.

helpers.name: RGBToHex
helpers.notes: Local parser helper, not an exported parser API.

helpers.name: derivePalette
helpers.notes: Local parser helper, not an exported parser API.

limitations: This group does not import design arrays, SVG/image output, color tables, or rendered examples.
Rendering behavior requires a separate focused review before being treated as canonical.

taskGroups.purpose: Record additional observed LibMoonCat limited-bundle helper categories related to accessories, eligibility, contracts, and lootprints.
limitations: This group is a name inventory only.
Accessory, eligibility, contract, and lootprint semantics are not documented or imported here.
This file is a surface index, not source-code documentation or canonical behavior proof.
Helper names are listed only where directly observed in docs or local upstream snapshots.
No source code, generated bundle contents, design arrays, trait rows, accessory data, images, or response payloads are imported.
Accepted and output forms are conservative and should be verified in a focused behavior pass before tool implementation.
The local upstream snapshots are reference inputs under the repo reference policy, not curated KB data.
todos: Review dist-js README and source-level jslib.cljs before promoting detailed JavaScript API behavior.
Add focused examples only after testing helper calls without importing large payloads.
Keep identifier conversion claims synchronized with data/identifier-conventions.json.
